creator: cedric@decemplex.net
text:
Sylpheed-Claws 2.6.0 don't work correctly with IMAP accounts and enabled TLS. Folders and mails could not be read.

Fix: 

I found the responsible bug in Sylpheed-Claws Bugzilla:
http://www.thewildbeast.co.uk/sylpheed-claws/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=1053

A patch can be found here:
http://www.colino.net/claws-mail/getpatchset.php3?ver=2.6.0cvs26

I could apply it against my Sylpheed-Claws 2.6.0, and it solves all my problems.
How-To-Repeat: Use 1 or more IMAP accounts with TLS enabled, it will fail.
